DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL BUILDING SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE AMENDED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Vacated

Defendant Universal Building Services, Inc., Jerry Nunez & Oscar Medina'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL BUILDING SERVICES, INC., JERRY NUNEZ & OSCAR MEDINA'S Motion For Summary Judgment is Off calendar. Dismissal of the entire action filed on March 15, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS UNIVERSAL BUILDING SERVICES, INC., JERRY NUNE AND OSCAR MEDINA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - To be heard at 9:30 am on the Law & Motion calendar. Pro Tem Judge: William Shapiro, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Written Discovery, Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jonathan W. Black, Kaufman Dolowich Voluck & Gonzo LLP, 415.926.7630, appearing for Defendants;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL BUILDING SERVICES, INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Written Discovery, Production Of Documents is GRANTED. Within 15 days of this Order Plaintiff must serve amended responses to Defendant's form and special interrogatories, and requests for production of documents, and produce all responsive documents. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
